title: rubus hirtus subsp. offensus
intro: Rubus hirtus subsp. officinalis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a plant species within the Rosaceae family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus subsp. officinalis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
